overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a player character emerging from a canvas tent and exploring a frontier campsite set in open grasslands with distant mountains. The scene features detailed camping equipment, a campfire, and other characters resting in the camp.

yellow wooden rocking chair near the campfire
metal fire pit with smoke rising

segments.scene_description: The view from inside a canvas tent looking out at a Western frontier campsite. Through the tent opening, a campfire with smoke, a wooden rocking chair, and a character sitting nearby are visible. The camera begins to move forward toward the tent entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie campsite with scattered equipment

events.description: exits the tent fully into the open grassland campsite
camera continues moving forward past the central campfire area

entered.detail: green canvas tent with open front showing bedding inside
wooden storage cabinet with supplies on top
metal lantern suspended from a wooden post

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the tent into the open prairie, revealing a fully equipped campsite with a green canvas shelter, campfire, and wooden furniture. The scene is bathed in bright midday sunlight with distant mountains visible. The camera moves steadily through the camp, passing the central fire area.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy prairie with supply cache and resting character

events.description: character lying on the ground begins to sit up as camera approaches

agents.ego_description: approaching a character lying on the ground near a wooden supply cabinet

mountain range visible on the horizon under blue sky

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the grassy campsite, the camera approaches a character lying on the ground near a wooden supply cabinet with canvas sacks. The tent recedes into the background as distant mountains become visible. The prone character begins to sit up as the camera draws near.

scene_state.functional_zone: close interaction area near supply cache

events.description: character sits up fully and camera begins circling around them
camera moves to close-up view of the character's face and upper body

agents.ego_description: circling around a character who has sat up, observing them from different angles in close proximity

notable_agents.action: character in grey coat and cowboy hat sitting up and looking around the camp

entered.detail: wooden barrel with metal bands near the tent area

segments.scene_description: The camera circles closely around a character who has risen to a sitting position, revealing details of their grey coat and cowboy hat. The wooden supply cabinet and canvas sacks are now prominent in the frame, while the original tent remains visible in the background. The movement focuses on observing the character from multiple angles.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the dim interior of a canvas tent out into a sun-drenched frontier campsite. It begins by moving forward through the tent opening, where a smoking campfire and a resting character are visible in the distance. As the camera emerges into the open prairie, the scene expands to reveal a fully equipped camp with green shelters and wooden furniture set against a backdrop of bright midday sunlight and distant mountains. The view then shifts deeper into the grassy terrain, passing the central fire toward a character lying on the ground near a wooden supply cabinet and canvas sacks. Finally, the camera circles closely around the character as they sit up, focusing on the details of their grey coat and cowboy hat while the original tent recedes into the background.
